headline: EPAM Systems Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: EPAM Systems (NYSE:EPAM) reported first-quarter 2026 revenue at the high end of its outlook and improved profitability, while management lowered its full-year revenue growth forecast amid macroeconomic uncertainty and slower decision-making among some clients. Chief Executive Officer and President
